events.title: Hacker House LatAm 2026
events.description: A 3-day co-living hackathon for developers building the future of decentralized tech. Connect with global sponsors, build prototypes, and pitch to leading VCs.

activities.title: Welcome & Onboarding Check-In
activities.description: Scan your QR code at the reception desk to complete your profile, receive your welcome kit, and activate your embedded wallet.

activities.title: Opening Ceremony & Sponsor Briefings
activities.description: Learn about the hackathon tracks, prizes, API keys, and workshops hosted by Google Cloud and Stripe.

activities.title: Workshop: Dynamic POAPs with Privy
activities.description: Deep dive into seedless wallets, Privy Auth, and generating NFT credentials dynamically on-chain.

activities.title: Project Submission & Pitch Desk
activities.description: Submit your completed project repository and present a 3-minute pitch to the judging panel.

activities.title: Sponsor Booth Rally: Google Cloud API
activities.description: Visit the Google Cloud booth, deploy a simple template, and scan the booth code for an exclusive badge.

activities.title: Event Feedback & Core Survey
activities.description: Share your thoughts about the Hacker House organization, venue, and sponsors to claim your Master POAP.

events.title: Zero-Friction Web3 Auth Workshop
events.description: An interactive hands-on workshop focused on seedless onboarding, smart accounts, and embedded wallets using Privy.

activities.title: Workshop Entrance Check-In
activities.description: Confirm your registered ticket details at the main door to enter.

activities.title: Hands-on Coding Session
activities.description: Integrate Privy React SDK, handle social authentication, and trigger on-chain operations with embedded wallets.

activities.title: Session Rating & Feedback
activities.description: Let us know how we can improve our developer tutorials.

events.title: AI & Web3 Founder Meetup
events.description: A high-level networking event for startup founders, investors, and engineers working at the intersection of AI models and decentralized protocols.

activities.title: Networking Check-In
activities.description: Grab a name badge, claim your welcome drink, and register your wallet address.

activities.title: Panel Discussion: The Future of Autonomous Agents
activities.description: A 45-minute discussion on the role of decentralized compute and AI agents in the digital economy.

activities.title: Vercel Fast Deploy Pitch
activities.description: Watch 5 founders demo their AI products deployed on Vercel Edge Networks in 1-minute lightning rounds.

badges.title: Genesis Pioneer
badges.description: Unlocked for setting up an embedded wallet and completing the welcome check-in activity.

badges.title: Code Alchemist
badges.description: Unlocked for participating in high-intensity workshops and submitting hackathon code repos.

badges.title: Genesis Pioneer
badges.description: Unlocked for setting up an embedded wallet and completing the welcome check-in activity.
